'''Yubookoo,''' an [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], was forced to fight in the [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] arenas. In order to fight without impediment, he trimmed his [[Hair/Legends|fur]] to a short stubble. Knowing that he would eventually [[Death/Legends|die]], Yubookoo became a fearsome fighter, known to have defeated sixteen [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] warriors.
